meaning: n.以私掠船巡逻,掳获商船
examples: European powers agree to end privateering.
Take letters from a warning friendly power authorizing privateering.
Letters of Marque: Take letters from a warning friendly power authorizing privateering.
Privateering is becoming especially prevalent in the acquisition of patent portfolios from other companies.
Her father, Lawrence, had served the Crown by privateering during the French and Indian War and made a fortune.
